title: Podman pull fails with short name (rhel-tools)
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

> Uncomment only one, leave it on its own line:
>
> /kind bug

Not sure if this would be considered a bug

>
> /kind feature

Perhaps this might be expected behavior, so I think it's a feature :-)

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

podman pull rhel-tools
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/rhel-tools:latest...Failed
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/rhel-tools:latest...Failed
Trying to pull docker.io/rhel-tools:latest...Failed
Trying to pull 172.30.0.0/16/rhel-tools:latest...

Also, broken in docker:

[root@rhel7 ~]# docker pull rhel-tools
Using default tag: latest
Trying to pull repository registry.access.redhat.com/rhel-tools ... 
Trying to pull repository registry.access.redhat.com/rhel-tools ... 
Trying to pull repository registry.fedoraproject.org/rhel-tools ... 
Trying to pull repository docker.io/library/rhel-tools ... 
Trying to pull repository docker.io/library/rhel-tools ... 
repository docker.io/rhel-tools not found: does not exist or no pull access.

I also tried:

podman pull rhel7/rhel-tools
Trying to pull rhel7/rhel-tools...Failed
error pulling image "rhel7/rhel-tools": unable to pull rhel7/rhel-tools: unable to find image in the registries defined in "/etc/containers/registries.conf"

The full URL works thougth:

podman pull registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7/support-tools
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7/support-tools...Getting image source signatures
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:313bb043666e4db013cc092b56725bb3230f4b95b36cc736b3629cb5452d28f0
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:514c0a80c7bf58a39d2f6e91cac18fd85aa6ad78f4bc341b14cbc8386af69306
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:04127453b413b3678586af6bac66b9c4cfaa94d12066ae009daec955ce03ba79
Copying config sha256:5991cf94beed33f6b86a44c4b22495905a265af0fda8b18207461dbffdb5433e
 4.12 KB / 4.12 KB [========================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
5991cf94beed33f6b86a44c4b22495905a265af0fda8b18207461dbffdb5433e


**Describe the results you received:**

Podman fails to find the image

**Describe the results you expected:**

I expect it to find the image and pull it :-)

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Also, happens in docker, so not sure if it's client side or registry side

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version
Version:       0.7.3
Go Version:    go1.9.2
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
host:
  MemFree: 378826752
  MemTotal: 3974197248
  SwapFree: 0
  SwapTotal: 0
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 1
  hostname: rhel7.dc2.crunchtools.com
  kernel: 3.10.0-862.9.1.el7.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 100h 1m 25.61s (Approximately 4.17 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - docker.io
  - 172.30.0.0/16
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 4
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
  ImageStore:
    number: 13
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

This is on a fully updated Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server release 7.5 (Maipo) - packages current as of 08/30/2018

comments.body:
Also, here is anther example with the rhel base image. I think it's a two part failure:

https://pastebin.com/1eb3waja

This is a bug in podman (A big one).  Works in buildah.
```
# podman pull rhel7/rhel-tools
Trying to pull rhel7/rhel-tools...Failed
error pulling image "rhel7/rhel-tools": unable to pull rhel7/rhel-tools: unable to pull image, or you do not have pull access
sh-4.4# buildah from  rhel7/rhel-tools
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:367d845540573038025f445c654675aa63905ec8682938fb45bc00f40849c37b
 24.00 MiB / ? [-----------------------------=--------------------------------] 
```
I can't reproduce with other images but I also don't have a login on Red Hat's registry. Are you logged into registry.access.redhat.com?
No any image with a REPO/image is failing because of the parser.  I have a fix for this.
